hook.headline: She’s a 10. I’m risking it off ONE story reply.

reply.text: I already told my mom you keep stealing me from my savings account

messages.text: she saw that striped bag and sighed out loud
she asked if you come with buyer protection
only return policy is missing me forever
so this is a long term investment then
depends how you behave during sale season
jokes on you, im the reusable bag
reusable where, cvs or luxury aisle mascot
i was literally about to dm you first
same, tears look better on leopard carpet
if i vanish just know she cut my card
its fine, i accept apple pay level feelings only
